summary: Iteration 21 (referral system) tested end-to-end. Full pytest suite (iterations 17-21) passes 53/53. Additional smoke suite (9 tests) covering login, backward-compat register, wallet/remit unchanged, and all referral endpoints (referrals/me, validate valid+invalid, credit/balance, credit/ledger) all pass. Frontend E2E: register?ref=<CODE> shows 'reg-invite-banner' with 'Invited by Smoke T.' masked name; login->settings->open-referral navigates to /referral; referral-code (KD1YU5BM), referral-share-link, referral-copy, referral-share, referral-balance (£0.00) all render correctly with 0 React console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking: several console warnings (shadow* deprecated, props.pointerEvents deprecated) exist across the app; pre-existing, not introduced by iter 21.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (register banner, settings entry, referral dashboard all pass with 0 console errors)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing smoketest@vaulted.app account (referral_code=KD1YU5BM). BC registration test creates disposable TEST_* users per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response uses 'access_token' key (not 'token'). Smoke user referral_code is currently KD1YU5BM. Register screen banner test uses masked format like 'Smoke T.' Expo web strips route groups so /(tabs)/wallet resolves to /wallet — use partial URL match instead of glob on '(tabs)'.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter 21 scope.
